goal: Small founder UI tweaks: reading-result IG FAB + Share button, navbar tab, poster wordmark
done: Enlarged bottom-right Instagram share FAB (button 44->52px, glyph 22->28px); added an Instagram glyph before the bottom Share button label via ::before mask (survives the JS textContent re-writes); renamed bottom-nav first tab Today->Home (EN 'Home' / TH 'หน้าแรก'); deepened Celtic Cross poster 'MeowTarot' wordmark #c9933a->#bf8a20 (old gold read muddy on the pastel bg).
verified: headless render of FAB + Share button at 390px viewport

goal: Stop object-fit:cover cropping off-ratio decks on the selection board + reading result
done: Introduced per-deck CSS vars (set in data.js from the active deck): --mt-card-ratio (BACK -> selection/draw boards) and --mt-card-face-ratio (FACE -> reading-result/arrange thumbs). Repointed 15 card aspect-ratio rules (10 back, 5 face); both default to the old spec so unconverted rules are unchanged. Vars re-applied on setActiveDeck.
root_cause: All slots/thumbs were hard-locked to aspect-ratio 1568/2720 (0.577) + object-fit:cover, but real art ships at 3 ratios AND a deck's BACK and FACE differ (moonmallow back 0.577 vs face 0.671; boba/overtime faces 0.558). Off-ratio art got its edges chopped.
fix: Two deck-driven aspect-ratio vars, back for boards / face for result thumbs.
verified: headless: pawbit selection board no back-crop; moonmallow 3-card result no face-crop

goal: Hidden toggle: reversed-card rendering = flip (rotate upright art, default) vs art (use -reversed.webp)
done: data.js: getReversedMode/setReversedMode (localStorage 'meowtarot_reversed_mode', default 'flip') + html[data-reversed-mode] attr. reading.js: mode-aware image sourcing at 3 spots (card sheet, getCardImageUrlWithFallback, resolveReadingResultRuntimeImageUrl). reading.css: 180deg rotation gated to html:not([data-reversed-mode='art']). poster.js: 6 renderers mode-aware via posterImageOrientation()/posterShouldRotateReversed() (default flip byte-identical; resolvePosterCardImageSources + call order untouched). profile.js: hidden dev toggle in the 'Other' disclosure, revealed by tapping its header 5x.
verified: headless reading flip (Magician rotated) + art (loads -reversed.webp, no rotation)
CI debug-poster-ci daily-reversed: correct rotation, exit 0

goal: Generate true 200px-wide card thumbnails + use them in the small multi-card posters
done: Generated NN-slug-{upright,reversed}-200.webp (200px wide) for all 11 decks on R2 meowtarot-assets via parallel agents: upright 857/858 (veila 40-four-of-cups has no source), reversed 858/858, 0 failures. poster.js prefers the -200 thumbnail (toPosterThumb200, full-res kept as first fallback) on SMALL multi-card posters only: Celtic Cross (84-132px), Full/Celtic story (150px), Ask-a-Question 3-card (260px). Big single hero/daily card (~520-560px) keeps full-res to avoid blur.
verified: CI poster daily hero uses full-res (not -200)
filed: veila-tarot/40-four-of-cups-upright-200 missing - no source -upright.webp on CDN
